dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Delete this board permanently. This will also remove all associated requests, comments, and votes.
dangerZone.dialogDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this board? This action cannot be undone.

deleteDialog.title: Delete request?
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this request? Its comments and votes will be permanently deleted.

hero.description: UpQuit centralizes requests, discussion, and voting in one place so product teams can triage faster, prioritize better, and ship with confidence.

flow.title: How a board moves from idea to plan
flow.description: A focused workflow keeps every request actionable without relying on vanity dashboards or noisy metrics.

capture.label: Capture
capture.text: Every idea lands in one shared queue instead of getting lost across chat, forms, and docs.

discuss.label: Discuss
discuss.text: Teams and customers add context directly on each request so decisions stay transparent.

prioritize.label: Prioritize
prioritize.text: Move top requests into planning with clear ownership and visible status updates.

roadmapSteps.0: Collect requests from customers and internal teams.
roadmapSteps.1: Cluster trends by impact and urgency.
roadmapSteps.2: Promote validated ideas to planned work.

realtime.title: Realtime collaboration
realtime.description: Comments, votes, and status updates stay synchronized for everyone in the board.

signal.title: Built for signal
signal.description: Filter noise quickly with structured states, ownership, and clear priorities.

multitenancy.title: Safe multitenancy
multitenancy.description: Run multiple customer communities with isolated spaces and consistent workflows.

footer.kicker: Built for teams that prioritize with context
footer.text: Create a workspace, invite collaborators, and start shaping your roadmap in one place.
